posts.title: Let's hack the world!
posts.text: Silence Dogood, the name of a fabricated widow, was a pseudonym of Benjamin Franklin. Silence is only pursued by Puritans. Whatever lies in obscurity, however, is quested by me. This sentence just came up to me a while ago: The last frontier of liberty and democracy is beds and dreams. So welcome, to my bed and dream.
